market_overview.headline: Market breadth deteriorating with major indices showing weakness and crypto in full bear mode.
market_overview.detail: SPY breaking down from bull structure while QQQ shows unstacked bearish EMAs. BTC in full bear crash -19% below 21W confirms risk-off sentiment across all asset classes.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates (Early Stage Setup)

items.name: Netflix, Inc.
items.note: Strong momentum +10% above 8W with analyst upgrades suggesting streaming recovery narrative intact.

items.note: Financial exchange operator showing dual bullish crossover potential near EMA support levels.

momentum_themes.headline: Momentum Accelerating in Commodity & Infrastructure
momentum_themes.detail: Energy minerals and non-energy minerals leading with 100% bullish participation rates. Industrial services and semiconductor equipment showing strong momentum despite broader tech weakness.

sector_analysis.headline: Clear Sector Rotation Into Commodities & Away From Tech

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with strong momentum in oil & gas names.
Copper, gold miners showing unanimous strength in commodity supercycle play.
Supply chain beneficiaries maintaining perfect bullish structure.

weakest.note: Tech bloodbath continues with 91% bearish participation including mega-caps.
Complete bearish washout in business services sector.
Discretionary spending concerns hitting durable goods hard.

sector_analysis.detail: Classic late-cycle rotation from growth/tech into value/commodities accelerating. Finance sector weakness (-19% net) suggests credit concerns emerging alongside tech selloff.

items.text: SPY bull breakdown with crossover risks suggests broad market uptrend fracturing
QQQ bearish structure with tech mega-caps in full bear signals Nasdaq leadership failure
BTC full bear crash -46% below fair value indicates extreme risk-off sentiment
45 bull breakdowns across market shows deteriorating participation despite commodity strength
